title: Age and looks
wikitext:
[]: Age and looks             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:23 pm So if you had to guess the ages of the Eva characters solely by the way they look, how old do you think they'd be? All the so called 'middle school' girls sure as hell don't look 13/14 years old, that's for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:27 pm Most of the children look early teens to me. Misato looks mid 20s, Ritsuko late 20s/early 30s (anyone else thinks she looks older than Misato?), Kaji too. Gendo is probably 40s, Fuyu I'd guess 60s. Age in anime is a tricky thing... hell, age in real life is a tricky thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sat Jun 28, 2008 3:09 pm Rei: 17-19 Asuka: 16 Shinji: 14 Toji: 16-17 Kensuke: 15 Hikari: 14-15 Kaworu: 17-20 Gendo: mid 40s Kozo: mid 60s Misato: late 20s Ritsuko: mid 30s Kaji: late 20s Shigeru: mid 20s Maya: early 20s Makoto: mid 20s

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sat Jun 28, 2008 4:12 pm Wikipedia lists Gendo as being 48 years old, by the way.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Jun 28, 2008 4:15 pm Keep in mind the shortness of the children in comparison to the adults.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jun 28, 2008 4:20 pm We know the official ages -- this is about how well they match with appearances. And then there are conventions, like most anime girls with amazing racks are 14 or younger, and the flat chested ones are in their late teens.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Sat Jun 28, 2008 6:11 pm NAveryW wrote: Keep in mind the shortness of the children in comparison to the adults.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 28, 2008 7:32 pm Gendo and Fuyu are on the tall side for Japanese males (6'0'' isn't bad at all for people of their generations) but the kids are all short by between three to six inches. It's unusual that Shinji is so short, because Gendo is tall and Yui is easily above-average.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sat Jun 28, 2008 8:17 pm Mr. Tines wrote: And then there are conventions, like most anime girls with amazing racks are 14 or younger, and the flat chested ones are in their late teens.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Sat Jun 28, 2008 8:58 pm You know, Shinji actually does look 14 to me. If not that, then 15, but nothing older. I guess it's also 'cause of his voice actor, whose voice is kind of childish. >.< Rei looks about 16-17, Asuka 16-18, Toji 16-18 and Kaworu something like 18-20. I can't be bothered naming the other characters.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 28, 2008 9:39 pm Evangelion__x wrote: I guess it's also 'cause of his voice actor, whose voice is kind of childish. >.<

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Sat Jun 28, 2008 9:42 pm UrsusArctos wrote: You should say voice actress . Shinji is voiced by Megumi Ogata, who specializes in teenage boys and boyish girls. (A prime example of the latter would be Sailor Uranus from Sailor Moon, who is initially mistaken for a boy)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Jun 28, 2008 10:01 pm in b4 anti-dub ranting, you'd better run very quickly lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Jun 28, 2008 10:46 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: . . .Ritsuko seems much older than Misato, even though Wikipedia claims they're only a year apart.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Jun 29, 2008 12:40 am UrsusArctos wrote: Gendo and Fuyu are on the tall side for Japanese males (6'0'' isn't bad at all for people of their generations) but the kids are all short by between three to six inches. It's unusual that Shinji is so short, because Gendo is tall and Yui is easily above-average.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Jun 29, 2008 8:01 am Iron Rooster wrote: @Evangelion__x - You really should consider watching the subs. I started with the dubs, but kept hearing about how the original is much more accurate. It really is true, especially in EoE. Please don't watch the dub of EoE. Amanda Winn Lee puts in some really unnecessary and annoying changes to the sound effects in some spots that kill the tone of scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Sun Jun 29, 2008 8:02 am Iron Rooster wrote: @Evangelion__x - You really should consider watching the subs. I started with the dubs, but kept hearing about how the original is much more accurate. It really is true, especially in EoE. Please don't watch the dub of EoE. Amanda Winn Lee puts in some really unnecessary and annoying changes to the sound effects in some spots that kill the tone of scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jun 29, 2008 8:19 am Rei's age changes depending how old I am at the time. Refer to this handy little graph.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Sun Jun 29, 2008 11:10 am ^ gold, zugz.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sun Jun 29, 2008 12:48 pm Zuggy wrote: Rei's age changes depending how old I am at the time. Refer to this handy little graph. [graph]
summary:
[]: Age and looks             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:23 pm So if you had to guess the ages of the Eva characters solely by the way they look, how old do you think they'd be? All the so called 'middle school' girls sure as hell don't look 13/14 years old, that's for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jun 28, 2008 2:27 pm M
